desc.de: Skalierbare VMs. 750+ Instance-Typen (General Purpose, Compute, Memory, Storage, Accelerated/GPU). Spot Instances, Placement Groups, Dedicated Hosts, Nitro-Architektur, ENA.
desc.en: Scalable VMs. 750+ instance types (general purpose, compute, memory, storage, accelerated/GPU). Spot instances, placement groups, dedicated hosts, Nitro architecture, ENA.

otcDesc.de: VMs mit Flavor-Naming: Typ.Generation.RAM-Ratio (z.B. s3.large.2 = General Purpose Gen3, 1:2 RAM). Typen: s (General), c (Compute), m (Memory), d (Disk-intensive), p/pi/pn (GPU V100, T4, A100, H100), hana (SAP). Windows/Linux, VPC-Integration, Multi-AZ, Auto Scaling. Spot-Flavors mit festen Rabatten (keine Auktion). Server Groups für Anti-Affinity.
otcDesc.en: VMs with flavor naming: type.generation.RAM-ratio (e.g. s3.large.2 = General Purpose Gen3, 1:2 RAM). Types: s (general), c (compute), m (memory), d (disk-intensive), p/pi (GPU V100/T4), hana (SAP). Windows/Linux, VPC integration, multi-AZ, Auto Scaling. Spot flavors with fixed discounts (no auctions). Server groups for anti-affinity.

migration.de: **Flavor-Schema.** m5.large → s3.large.2 — Suffix gibt RAM-Ratio an (.2 = 1:2 vCPU:RAM). GPU-Flavors (A100, H100) verfügbar. **Image-Formate.** AMI-Export nur als RAW/VMDK, kein QCOW2. **Netzwerk & Security.** Security Groups max 50 Regeln (AWS: 60). Kein Nitro/ENA — EVS-Performance-Tiers prüfen. Elastic IPs pro Region limitiert. **Cloud-Init.** User Data Scripts prüfen — Versionsunterschiede zwischen AWS und OTC können Probleme machen. **Spot & Placement.** Spot-Instanzen haben feste Rabatte statt Auktionsmodell. Placement Groups → nur Server Groups mit Anti-Affinity. **Nicht verfügbar.** Keine Dedicated Hosts, kein Capacity Reservations.
migration.en: **Flavor schema.** m5.large → s3.large.2 — suffix indicates RAM ratio (.2 = 1:2 vCPU:RAM). GPU flavors (A100, H100) available. **Image formats.** AMI export only as RAW/VMDK, no QCOW2. **Networking & security.** Security groups max 50 rules (AWS: 60). No Nitro/ENA — check EVS performance tiers. Elastic IPs limited per region. **Cloud-Init.** Check User Data scripts — version differences between AWS and OTC can cause issues. **Spot & placement.** Spot instances use fixed discounts instead of auction model. Placement Groups → only Server Groups with anti-affinity. **Not available.** No dedicated hosts, no capacity reservations.

desc.de: Automatische Skalierung von EC2-Instanzen. Launch Configurations/Templates, Scaling Policies (Target Tracking, Step, Scheduled), Predictive Scaling.
desc.en: Automatic scaling of EC2 instances. Launch configurations/templates, scaling policies (target tracking, step, scheduled), predictive scaling.

otcDesc.de: Automatische ECS-Skalierung und Bandwidth-Scaling. AS-Gruppen, AS-Konfigurationen, Scaling-Policies (Alarm-basiert, Scheduled, Lifecycle Hooks).
otcDesc.en: Automatic ECS scaling and bandwidth scaling. AS groups, AS configurations, scaling policies (alarm-based, scheduled, lifecycle hooks).

alt.de: Kubernetes HPA/VPA auf CCE, Terraform + Cron
alt.en: Kubernetes HPA/VPA on CCE, Terraform + Cron

migration.de: **Alarm-basiertes Scaling.** OTC AS nutzt Cloud Eye Alarme statt CloudWatch. Target Tracking Policies gibt es nicht — nur Step/Simple Scaling mit Cloud-Eye-Schwellwerten. **AS Configurations.** Launch Configurations → AS Configurations (ähnlich, aber andere Parameter-Namen). Cooldown-Perioden und Health Check Grace Period separat konfigurierbar. **Kein Predictive Scaling.** Vorausschauende Skalierung fehlt komplett. **Flavor-Einschränkung.** Mixed Instance Policies (On-Demand + Spot) nicht verfügbar — nur ein Flavor pro AS-Gruppe. **Lifecycle Hooks.** OTC nutzt SMN-Benachrichtigungen statt SNS/SQS für Hook-Notifications.
migration.en: **Alarm-based scaling.** OTC AS uses Cloud Eye alarms instead of CloudWatch. Target Tracking policies don't exist — only Step/Simple Scaling with Cloud Eye thresholds. **AS configurations.** Launch Configurations → AS Configurations (similar but different parameter names). Cooldown periods and health check grace period configurable separately. **No Predictive Scaling.** Predictive scaling is completely missing. **Flavor restriction.** Mixed Instance Policies (On-Demand + Spot) not available — only one flavor per AS group. **Lifecycle Hooks.** OTC uses SMN notifications instead of SNS/SQS for hook notifications.

desc.de: Managed PaaS für Webanwendungen. Automatisches Deployment, Skalierung, Load Balancing, Health Monitoring. Unterstützt Java, .NET, Node.js, Python, Ruby, Go, Docker.
desc.en: Managed PaaS for web applications. Automatic deployment, scaling, load balancing, health monitoring. Supports Java, .NET, Node.js, Python, Ruby, Go, Docker.

otcDesc.de: Kein direktes Pendant auf OTC. Kein managed PaaS-Service der automatisch Infrastruktur provisioniert und Anwendungen deployt.
otcDesc.en: No direct equivalent on OTC. No managed PaaS service that automatically provisions infrastructure and deploys applications.

alt.de: CCE + Helm Charts (Kubernetes-basiert), Docker auf ECS (manuelles Setup), APIG + FunctionGraph (für einfache Web-APIs), ServiceStage (falls in der Region verfügbar)
alt.en: CCE + Helm Charts (Kubernetes-based), Docker on ECS (manual setup), APIG + FunctionGraph (for simple web APIs), ServiceStage (if available in the region)

migration.de: **Kein PaaS-Pendant.** OTC bietet keinen Managed PaaS wie Beanstalk. Die gesamte Plattform-Abstraktion (Auto Scaling, Load Balancing, Health Monitoring) muss selbst aufgebaut werden. **Container-Alternative.** CCE mit Helm Charts für Container-Deployments oder CCI für serverlose Container. **Konfigurations-Mapping.** Environment Variables → Kubernetes ConfigMaps/Secrets. .ebextensions → Helm Values oder Init-Container. **Worker Environments.** Beanstalk Worker Environments → DMS Kafka- oder RabbitMQ-Consumer auf CCE. **CI/CD.** Managed Platform Updates gibt es nicht — eigene CI/CD-Pipeline für Rolling Updates und Blue/Green Deployments nötig.
migration.en: **No PaaS equivalent.** OTC has no managed PaaS like Beanstalk. The entire platform abstraction (auto scaling, load balancing, health monitoring) must be built manually. **Container alternative.** CCE with Helm Charts for container deployments or CCI for serverless containers. **Configuration mapping.** Environment Variables → Kubernetes ConfigMaps/Secrets. .ebextensions → Helm Values or init containers. **Worker environments.** Beanstalk Worker Environments → DMS Kafka or RabbitMQ consumers on CCE. **CI/CD.** Managed Platform Updates don't exist — custom CI/CD pipeline needed for rolling updates and blue/green deployments.
